parameters.name: address
parameters.label: Computer Name / IP
parameters.description: The IP address of the computer with the transmitting Touch Out . Use

parameters.name: port
parameters.label: Network Port
parameters.description: The TCP/IP port that the Touch Out is transmitting on.

parameters.name: active
parameters.label: Active
parameters.description: Receives image data while Active is on.

parameters.name: mintarget
parameters.label: Minimum Target
parameters.description: The smallest amount of queue data (represented in seconds) allowed without adjusting sampling speed.

parameters.name: maxtarget
parameters.label: Maximum Target
parameters.description: The largest amount of queue data (represented in seconds) allowed without adjusting sampling speed.

parameters.name: maxqueue
parameters.label: Maximum Queue
parameters.description: The maximum allowed size of the queue (represented in seconds). If the maximum queue size is exceeded, data will be removed from the front of the queue.
